title: BEM-731B Claude runtime clean
objective:
Run script:
"""
sep='\n'
for d in ['scripts','.github/workflows','governance/state','governance/reports','governance/codex/proofs','governance/transport']:
    Path(d).mkdir(parents=True,exist_ok=True)
created='2026-05-21 | 13:52 (UTC+3)'
script=Path('scripts/record_claude_inbound_workflow_state.py')
script.write_text('''#!/usr/bin/env python3\nimport json\nimport sys\nfrom datetime import datetime, timedelta, timezone\nfrom pathlib import Path\nSEP="\\n"\nKYIV=timezone(timedelta(hours=3))\nSTATE=Path("governance/state/claude_inbound_mailbox_workflow_state.json")\nREPORT=Path("governance/reports/claude_inbound_mailbox_workflow_state.md")\nmode=sys.argv[1] if len(sys.argv)>1 else "tick"\noutcome=sys.argv[2] if len(sys.argv)>2 else "unknown"\nnow=datetime.now(KYIV).strftime("%Y-%m-%d | %H:%M (UTC+3)")\ntry:\n    data=json.loads(STATE.read_text(encoding="utf-8", errors="ignore")) if STATE.exists() else {}\nexcept:\n    data={}\nruns=data.get("runs",[]) if isinstance(data.get("runs",[]),list) else []\nruns.append({"time":now,"mode":mode,"outcome":outcome})\nruns=runs[-100:]\nif mode=="start": data["started_at"]=now\nif mode=="complete":\n    data["completed_at"]=now\n    data["claude_action_outcome"]=outcome\ndata.update({"schema_version":"claude_inbound_mailbox_workflow_state.v1","status":"runtime_"+mode,"latest":{"mode":mode,"outcome":outcome,"time":now},"runs":runs,"operator_role":"none"})\nSTATE.parent.mkdir(parents=True,exist_ok=True)\nSTATE.write_text(json.dumps(data,indent=2,ensure_ascii=False)+SEP,encoding="utf-8")\nREPORT.parent.mkdir(parents=True,exist_ok=True)\nREPORT.write_text("# Claude Inbound Mailbox Workflow State"+SEP+SEP+"Time: "+now+SEP+"Mode: "+mode+SEP+"Outcome: "+outcome+SEP+"Operator role: none"+SEP,encoding="utf-8")\nprint(json.dumps({"mode":mode,"outcome":outcome,"time":now},ensure_ascii=False))\n''')
wf=Path('.github/workflows/claude-internal-auditor-mailbox.yml')
wf.write_text('''name: Claude Internal Auditor Mailbox

on:
  workflow_dispatch:
  push:
    paths:
      - 'governance/audit_mailbox/gpt_to_claude/**'
      - '.github/workflows/claude-internal-auditor-mailbox.yml'
      - 'scripts/record_claude_inbound_workflow_state.py'

permissions:
  contents: write
  issues: write

concurrency:
  group: claude-internal-auditor-mailbox
  cancel-in-progress: false

jobs:
  claude-internal-auditor:
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    timeout-minutes: 30
    steps:
      - uses: actions/checkout@v4
        with:
          fetch-depth: 0
      - name: Syntax check state recorder
        run: python3 -m py_compile scripts/record_claude_inbound_workflow_state.py
      - name: Record workflow start
        run: python3 scripts/record_claude_inbound_workflow_state.py start started
      - name: Claude internal auditor responds to mailbox
        id: claude_response
        continue-on-error: true
        uses: anthropics/claude-code-action@v1
        env:
          CLAUDE_CODE_OAUTH_TOKEN: ${{ secrets.CLAUDE_CODE_OAUTH_TOKEN }}
        with:
          anthropic_api_key: ${{ secrets.ANTHROPIC_API_KEY }}
          prompt: |
            You are Claude Internal Auditor for repository bereznyi-aleksandr/ai-devops-system.
            Read the newest file in governance/audit_mailbox/gpt_to_claude/.
            Write a concise response to governance/audit_mailbox/claude_to_gpt/ with a filename containing the BEM id.
            Include explicit Decision: APPROVED / CHANGE_REQUIRED / BLOCKED when asked.
            If asked why no prior response existed, explain the runtime or trigger reason based on repository evidence.
            Do not write issue comments. Do not expose secrets.
          claude_args: |
            --max-turns 8
      - name: Record workflow completion
        if: always()
        env:
          CLAUDE_OUTCOME: ${{ steps.claude_response.outcome }}
        run: python3 scripts/record_claude_inbound_workflow_state.py complete "$CLAUDE_OUTCOME"
      - name: Commit Claude mailbox response and runtime state
        if: always()
        run: |
          git config user.name "github-actions[bot]"
          git config user.email "41898282+github-actions[bot]@users.noreply.github.com"
          git add -A governance/audit_mailbox/claude_to_gpt governance/state/claude_inbound_mailbox_workflow_state.json governance/reports/claude_inbound_mailbox_workflow_state.md governance/state governance/reports governance/transport || true
          git diff --cached --quiet && echo "No changes" || git commit -m "BEM-731B Claude inbound runtime state"
          git pull --rebase --autostash origin main || true
          git push || true
''')
checks=[
 {'name':'recorder_script_exists','pass':script.exists(),'evidence':str(script)},
 {'name':'workflow_records_start','pass':'Record workflow start' in wf.read_text(errors='ignore'),'evidence':str(wf)},
 {'name':'workflow_records_completion_always','pass':'if: always()' in wf.read_text(errors='ignore'),'evidence':str(wf)},
 {'name':'claude_continue_on_error','pass':'continue-on-error: true' in wf.read_text(errors='ignore'),'evidence':str(wf)},
 {'name':'no_forbidden_permission_word','pass':'pull-requests' not in wf.read_text(errors='ignore'),'evidence':str(wf)}
]
failed=[x for x in checks if not x['pass']]
status='claude_inbound_runtime_evidence_installed' if not failed else 'failed'
blocker=None if not failed else {'code':'CLAUDE_RUNTIME_EVIDENCE_INSTALL_FAILED','failed':failed}
state={'schema_version':'claude_inbound_runtime_evidence_clean.v1','bem':'BEM-731B','status':status,'checks':checks,'blocker':blocker,'created_at':created}
state_file=Path('governance/state/bem731b_claude_inbound_runtime_evidence_clean.json')
state_file.write_text(json.dumps(state,indent=2,ensure_ascii=False)+sep)
report=Path('governance/reports/bem731b_claude_inbound_runtime_evidence_clean.md')
report.write_text('# BEM-731B | Claude Inbound Runtime Evidence Clean | '+status.upper()+sep+sep+'Дата: '+created+sep+sep+'Claude inbound workflow now records start/completion/outcome state even if Claude Action fails.'+sep+sep+'Blocker: '+('null' if blocker is None else json.dumps(blocker,ensure_ascii=False))+sep)
transport=Path('governance/transport/results.jsonl')
with transport.open('a',encoding='utf-8') as h:
    h.write(json.dumps({'record_type':'bem731b_claude_inbound_runtime_evidence_clean','status':status,'blocker':blocker,'created_at':created},ensure_ascii=False)+sep)
proof=Path('governance/codex/proofs/bem731b_claude_inbound_runtime_evidence_clean.txt')
proof.write_text('BEM-731B '+status+'\n')
changed_files.extend([str(script),str(wf),str(state_file),str(report),str(transport),str(proof)])
ops_applied.append('Patched Claude inbound workflow to record runtime start/completion/outcome state and commit it even if Claude action fails, using clean permissions')
"""
No issue comments.
